overview: Indi Negocio Libre is a comprehensive, multi-tenant business management platform for herbal product distributors. It supports inventory management, sales, purchase orders, customer tracking with health metrics, role-based access, multi-lingual UI, and a Super Admin oversight dashboard.
features: Multi-tenant business profiles with role-based access (Super Admin, Admin, Staff, Referral User)
Sales cart with return orders, payment tracking, and receipt PDF generation
Customer management with body composition, body inches, primary goals, and medical issues tracking
Inventory management with FIFO, loaner/temporary stock, and warehouse sharing
Purchase orders with vendor management and inventory auto-increment
Multi-lingual UI (English, Gujarati, Hindi) with per-user preference
Super Admin dashboard with canister cycles monitoring and profile management
Automated regression test suite at /admin/tests with 130+ checks
Background notification jobs for overdue payments, follow-ups, and lead reminders
CSV bulk import/export for products, categories, customers, goals, and medical issues
